ui.settings.title: Settings
ui.settings.description: Change the display language and Cookie preferences.
ui.settings.language.title: Language
ui.settings.language.description: Choose the language used for the interface.
ui.settings.cookie.title: Cookie Settings
ui.settings.cookie.description: FS!QR uses Cookies to provide a better experience. Required Cookies are always enabled, and optional Cookies can be changed here.
ui.settings.cookie.summary: Required Cookies are always enabled and essential for providing the service. You can change optional Cookie settings below.
ui.settings.cookie.categories: Set Cookie usage by category. Required Cookies are always enabled for basic functionality.
ui.settings.cookie.necessary.title: Required Cookies
ui.settings.cookie.necessary.description: These are required for basic site functionality and cannot be disabled.
ui.settings.cookie.analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
ui.settings.cookie.analytics.description: Collects usage data to understand how the site is used and improve the service.
ui.settings.cookie.marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
ui.settings.cookie.marketing.description: Used to show relevant ads and announcements.

js.upload.send_error: An error occurred while sending. Check your connection and try again.
js.upload.invalid_filename: An invalid file name is included. Rename the file and try again.
